为什么网站会处于维护模式？
column2: Why is the website in maintenance mode?

column1: 网站可能发生系统升级事件，或者大多数的内容发生变化，程序员们正在维护或者升级数据以提供更加优质的服务。
column2: The website may be undergoing system upgrades, or most of the content is being changed. Our developers are maintaining or upgrading data to provide better services.
How long will it take to recover?

column1: 大部分的网站升级活动都只有几分钟甚至几秒钟的时间。
column2: Most website upgrade activities only take a few minutes or even seconds.
